summary: Phase B2.1 operational fixes verification completed - all 17 backend tests passed (100%). Both parked issues from Phase B2 are confirmed fixed: (1) /api/auth/login no longer returns 500 errors, (2) price_min/price_max filters now work correctly in strict mode with proper meta field.
passed_tests: Auth login regression (6/6): admin/manager/teamlead login with valid creds → 200 + JWT + correct roles
Auth error handling: wrong password → 401, empty body → 400/422, no 500 errors detected
GET /api/auth/me with bearer token → 200 + matching user payload
Price filter strict mode (6/6): base query returns total=720 with meta.price_filter_mode='strict'
Regression checks (5/5): make=Toyota → 98 results, year_min=2020 → 241 results

success_percentage.frontend: Not tested (backend-only verification as per review request)
